data.title: AC Immune Initiates Final Cohort in Ongoing Phase 1b/2 ABATE Trial of Anti-Abeta Active Immunotherapy to Treat Alzheimer's Disease
data.description: AC Immune has started the last group in the continuous Phase 1b/2 ABATE trial for Anti-Abeta Active Immunotherapy aimed at treating Alzheimer's disease. The study aims to enroll a total of 30 patients and has currently completed enrollment of 27 participants. This immunotherapy treatment option shows promise in potentially addressing the underlying causes of Alzheimer's disease.
Novartis finalizes US manufacturing and R&D expansion plan with seventh new facility

data.title: Axogen, Inc. to Participate in the 2026 Bank of America Global Healthcare Conference
data.description: Axogen, Inc., a renowned company specializing in pioneering surgical solutions for restoring peripheral nerve function, disclosed its involvement in the upcoming 2026 Bank of America Global Healthcare Conference. The conference will serve as a platform for Axogen to showcase its innovative products and strategies to investors and stakeholders. As a leading player in the industry, Axogen's participation in such events highlights its commitment to advancements in healthcare. The company's presence at the conference, which will take place in Alachua, Florida, and Tampa, Florida, is eagerly anticipated by market experts and industry enthusiasts. Investors and individuals keen on the latest developments in healthcare can expect valuable insights and updates from Axogen during the conference. This participation marks a significant milestone for Axogen, listed as (NASDAQ: AXGN), as they continue to make strides in the field of surgical solutions.

data.title: TriNet Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, there was an 11% increase in GAAP Earnings per Diluted Share to $1.90, and a 25% surge in Adjusted Net Income per Diluted Share to $2.48. During this period, around $71 million was given back to shareholders via stock repurchases and dividends. This update was announced from Dublin, California on April 30th.

data.title: Katherine Gorrell joins BioStem as Chief Legal & Compliance Officer to strengthen leadership team.
data.description: A recent report reveals a significant decrease in global carbon emissions during 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic, dropping by approximately 7%. This decline is the largest on record, with an estimated reduction of 2.6 billion metric tons of carbon dioxide compared to the previous year. The decrease can be attributed to the lockdowns and travel restrictions implemented worldwide, leading to a decrease in transportation and industrial activities. However, experts warn that this reduction is temporary and highlight the need for sustainable, long-term solutions to combat climate change. This news underscores the potential impact human behavior can have on carbon emissions and the environment.

data.title: A2Z Cust2Mate Expands into Home Goods Retail, Deploying 2,000 Smart Shopping Carts at HaStock
data.description: Today, in Toronto on April 30, 2026, A2Z Cust2Mate Solutions Corp. (NASDAQ: AZ), a prominent company in smart retail technology, partnered with HaStock, a rapidly expanding home goods retail chain in Israel boasting more than 50 stores nationwide. They revealed their joint initiative to introduce 2,000 Cust2Mate smart solutions in these stores.

data.title: RentCafe Launches ChatGPT App, Bringing Conversational Apartment Search to Renters
data.description: A recent application integration has made RentCafe's extensive collection of rental listings available on ChatGPT. This includes updated pricing, reviews from current residents, and promotions on rent. This collaboration allows individuals to easily discover their next apartment through a chat interface. This development was announced by RentCafe in Santa Barbara, California on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Newo.ai brings enterprise-level AI Voice Receptionist to AAO 2026 Annual Session in Orlando
data.description: Newo.ai, a pioneering company in industrial-grade AI voice and text receptionists, is set to present live demonstrations of the sole AI agent available for multi-location orthodontic and dental call centers in Orlando, Florida on April 30, 2026. This cutting-edge technology is tailored for the dental industry and is designed to enhance efficiency and customer service across multiple locations.

data.title: OG&E Announces Landmark Contract with Google
data.description: Oklahoma City - On April 30, 2026, OG&E, the subsidiary of OGE Energy Corp. (NYSE: OGE) based locally, revealed a new agreement ensuring consumer safeguards while integrating three additional data centers into the electrical grid. This contract emphasizes the company's commitment to providing reliable power to these facilities.

data.title: Beyond the Factory Floor: Where Roller Chains Power Unexpected Engineering Applications
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky on April 30, 2026, USA Roller Chain announced groundbreaking findings showcasing the versatile applications of roller chains outside of their conventional industrial uses. These insights reveal the crucial role roller chains play in enhancing motion and performance in various advanced and unconventional settings. This new information underscores the significance of roller chains in diverse applications, with far-reaching implications for industries beyond the standard industrial sphere.

data.title: Labcorp Announces 2026 First Quarter Results; Raises Full Year 2026 Guidance
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, the company reported a revenue of $3.54 billion, a 5.8% increase from the $3.35 billion reported in the first quarter of 2025. The diluted earnings per share (EPS) also saw significant growth, reaching $3.35 compared to $2.52 in the previous year, marking a 32.8% increase. Additionally, the adjusted EPS for the first quarter of 2026 was $4.25, up by 10.6% from $3.84 in the same period in 2025.Furthermore, the company raised its full-year enterprise revenue guidance. The specific revenue guidance was not provided in the given information.

data.title: BD Achieves Excellence in Employee Well‑Being, Earning Top Industry Recognition
data.description: A significant collaboration has been announced among Business Group on Health, Cigna Healthcare, and the American Heart Association to showcase BD's pioneering strategy to enhance the health and well-being of employees. BD, also known as Becton, Dickinson and Company and listed on the NYSE as BDX, is at the forefront of this effort. This partnership aims to promote a holistic approach to employee health and well-being. The announcement was made in Franklin Lakes, N.J., on April 30, 2026.

data.title: X Financial Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Shenzhen, China, a prominent online personal finance company, X Financial (NYSE: XYF), disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the period concluding on December 31, 2025. This filing was made with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Iron Mountain Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), a prominent player in information management services, has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company expressed satisfaction with the quarter, noting exceptional performance that surpassed expectations and demonstrated robustness across all important measures. The business is currently enjoying considerable momentum, particularly fueled by remarkable achievements in key growth sectors such as data center, ALM, and digital services.
High Arctic reveals 2025 Q4 & full year results in a recent update.

Oil producing countries are still reeling from the UAE's shock decision to leave OPEC. CGTN's Johannes Pleschberger spoke with Johannes Benign, Director of Energy and Politics, JBC Vienna about what the UAE will do now that they have left OPEC.

data.title: ADT Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Today, ADT disclosed its financial performance for Q1 2026, highlighting robust results in terms of revenue and cash flow.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise; Google, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft Are Big Earnings Movers
data.description: The futures market witnessed a decline in response to a slump in earnings from Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta, while Google saw a rise. Amidst this, oil prices recorded a significant surge. It is worth noting that Fed Chair Powell has decided to remain in his position. Overall, the Dow Jones futures experienced an increase, with notable movements from Google, Amazon, Meta, and Microsoft impacting the market.
Iran's Supreme Leader: Iran to guard missile and nuclear tech like its borders.
Kimco Realty® reports Q1 2026 results with a net income of $75 million, surpassing analyst expectations.
